response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, critical for this role; their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web platforms, with no evidence of distributed systems, routing tile optimization, or navigation data infrastructure. While they have GIS-related open-source projects, these are built with non-core technologies and lack the scale, reliability, or low-latency engineering required.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions in GIS and data collection platforms
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Extensive experience with testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time data consistency
Primary tech stack (JS/TS, DLang) mismatches core requirement of C++ for routing tile systems
